# Double standards

# Packages

# Adopted
CSA C22.2 NO. 286:23


# Pattern of
# CSA A123.17-05 (R2019)
# "A123.17" is the standard number
# "05" is the designation year 2005
# "(RYYYY)" is the reaffirmed year

# CSA adopted standards from ISO/IEC
# "CSA ISO/IEC TR 19758:04/A1:06 (R2024)" means
# - CSA adopted ISO/IEC TR 19758:2004
# - Amendment 1 published in 2006 is included
# - The latest reaffirm date of the CSA standard was completed in 2024
